data.title: Cryptocurrency prices skyrocket with Bitcoin at $116,439.73, Ethereum at $4,051.48, XRP at $3.29. Market driven by institutional interest. Information about large transactions volume, active addresses. 106,668 traders were liquidated in past 24 hours for $332.89 million. Some notable gainers/losers: Aerodrome Finance, Pendle, Lido DAO.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are experiencing a surge in trading activity, fueled by strong interest from both institutional and retail investors, buoyed by positive regulatory changes. The current prices for some major cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) at $116,439.73, Ethereum (ETH) at $4,051.48, Solana (SOL) at $177.78, XRP at $3.29, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.2277, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001321. Recent data indicates that large transactions for Bitcoin decreased by 2.4%, while Ethereum saw a 15.7% increase in a single day. Daily active addresses for Bitcoin decreased by 1.7%, while Ethereum's increased by 1.3%. Additionally, CoinGlass reported that 106,668 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, resulting in a total of $332.89 million. The top performers in terms of gains and losses within the same period include Aerodrome Finance (AERO), Pendle (PENDLE), and Lido DAO (LDO). Exciting developments in the blockchain sector are also unfolding. For the complete story, visit a trusted financial news platform.

data.title: Weyerhaeuser Company declares $0.21 quarterly dividend per share on common stock, payable on Sep 12, to holders of record.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) declared a quarterly base cash dividend of $0.21 per share on its common stock. This dividend will be paid in cash on September 12, 2025, to holders of record as of that date.

data.description: Barnes & Noble Education has announced its inability to submit the Form 10-K within the additional 15-day extension allowed by Rule 12b-25.

data.title: Gold-miner stocks show potential outperformance compared to spot gold price. Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. issues news on Aug. 8, 2025.
data.description: Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. has released a statement from Vancouver, BC on August 8, 2025, suggesting that gold-miner stocks may be on the verge of a significant breakthrough. Recent trends point towards potential outperformance of these stocks in comparison to the spot gold price. This comes amidst positive market sentiment surrounding gold investments, with analysts predicting notable growth in the sector. Investors are closely monitoring this development, with hopes of capitalizing on the opportunity presented by the current market conditions.

data.title: Dover Corp raises dividend to $0.52 per share, up from $0.515, an increase of $0.005 per share.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, in Downers Grove, Illinois, the Board of Directors at Dover Corporation (NYSE: DOV) announced a raise in its quarterly cash dividend from $0.515 to $0.52 per share. This increase equates to $0.005 per share.

data.title: Calidi Biotherapeutics (CLDI) reports Q2 2025 financial results and highlights, aiming to deliver genetic medicines.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Calidi Biotherapeutics Inc. (NYSE American: CLDI) disclosed its second quarter 2025 operational and financial outcomes. The company, known for advancing targeted therapies capable of administering genetic medicines to distant disease sites, shared key business updates alongside this report.

data.title: NI Holdings, Inc. announced second quarter results for June 30, 2025, with detailed financial data.
data.description: In Fargo, North Dakota, NI Holdings, Inc. disclosed their quarterly results for the period concluding on June 30, 2025, on August 8, 2025. The announcement was made by the company trading under the stock symbol NODK on the NASDAQ.
